nasb.text: “As for you, My sheep, the sheep of My pasture, you are men, and I am your God,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And you are my sheep, human sheep of my pasture, and I am your God, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 你們是我的羊，是我草場上的羊；我是你們的　神。這是耶和華的宣告。’”

ccb.text: 你们是我草场上的羊，你们是我的子民，我是你们的上帝。这是主耶和华说的。’”
